channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Sleeping Bag
item.description: A sleeping bag that can be worn in the waist slot. Sneak + R-click to pickup and auto-equip.

item.title: Boat Speed Tweaks
item.description: Multiply Sailboats and Rafts speed by the configured factor, separately (default for both = 2.0)

item.title: Cheap Metal Blocks
item.description: Adds recipes for the metal blocks. 1 bit is 1 block for chiseling.

item.title: Age of Seraphs Specialized Classes
item.description: Age of Seraphs Specialized Classes Fork

item.title: Greyhaven Companions
item.description: A companion mod built for the Greyhaven SMP, part of the Mossfall Network.

item.title: Healing Malk
item.description: milk know heals you for 1 hp ૮꒰ ˶• ༝ •˶꒱ა

item.title: VS Director
item.description: A director camera mod for video production workflows.（导演模式模组）

item.title: Seraph Atelier - Player Model Lib
item.description: Look cute while you do pottery, starve, and get hunted by horrors beyond comprehension!

item.title: Kaschperle Class Mix
item.description: A revision mix from the popular class mod Aldi classes and Agi's Classes

item.title: MoreInventorys
item.description: The mod adds new inventories for convenient and immersive storage: Shelves, crates, racks for weapon

item.title: Equus: Mustang Colors
item.description: Makes equus ferus horses look more like mustangs

item.title: Jelly Bundle
item.description: A compilation of tweaks for the Swamp Jelly server.

item.title: VSNH Tweaks
item.description: Tweaks and modifications for the Vintage Story New Horizons server.

item.title: Launcher Mod Updater
item.description: When a world is loaded, it offers to download new updates for active mods.

item.title: Akira's Tweaks
item.description: Collection of patches for a personal server.

item.title: The Crown & The Coalition Server Tweaks
item.description: Server tweaks for The Crown & The Coalition.

item.title: Ecosystem - Flora
item.description: Making flora living

item.title: Clay Press
item.description: A simple patch to allow the pulverizer to "press" clay into tiles & shingles (no more clayforming)!

item.title: ReModel
item.description: Allows running .charsel to only swap the player model without changing class

item.title: CB Patches
item.description: JSON content patches for my small personal server

item.title: Resonator Overhaul
item.description: Per-resonator volume, falloff and looping — saved to the world and audible with Music off.

item.title: Apotheosis Tweak - Fantasy Creature Balance
item.description: Balance tweaks to Fantasy Creatures Reborn

item.title: Battle Towers No Tools No Armors Patch
item.description: Remove all tools, weapons and armors from loot tables in underground and surface towers.

item.title: Battle Towers No Armors Patch
item.description: Remove all armors from loot tables in underground and surface towers

item.title: Battle Towers No Tools Patch
item.description: Remove all tools from battle towers loot table

item.title: Battle Towers
item.description: Add Towers with dangerous creatures to fight and explore in your world

item.title: TinkerTailor - Backpacks
item.description: More backpacks & pouches for the veteran seraph. Made with love & pain, No AI.

item.title: Quartermaster
item.description: Run your whole base from one desk.

item.title: Spawners API
item.description: Add custom spawners

item.title: Elk Adornments
item.description: Masks for you and your elk with Modular Elk Armor!
